overview: BHRT, Inc. provides bio-identical hormone replacement therapy, pellet therapy, and peptide therapy to address hormonal imbalances and symptoms such as menopause and andropause. Operated by Dr. Mikhail Berman, the practice serves Broward, Palm Beach, and Martin Counties.
highlights: Seven locations across Central and South Florida
targetAudience: Individuals experiencing hormonal imbalances, menopause, andropause, or loss of libido seeking integrative hormone therapy.
